4_stars.priority: #1 priority upgrade for every hero - highest power jump in the game

upgrade_strategy: Push your main attack hero to 4 stars first for the Super Sensory bonus
Then push your secondary and support heroes to 4 stars
Only pursue 5 stars (Exclusive Weapon) once key heroes are at 4 stars
Spending shards on an off-type hero is always wasteful
critical_rule: NEVER tell a player to upgrade a hero that is already at the target star level. Always verify current star count from the player profile before giving advice.
